title: Analytics - Events are not gathered if user is logged out and has not opted into data-sharing
scenario: Events are not gathered when user is logged out and has not opted into data-sharing
steps: Ensure user is not logged in and has not opted into data-sharing (App Settings > General > Account > Share Data toggle is off).
Trigger any event present on Firebase (e.g., device_added which gathers Device's Serial Number).
expected: Event count for the Device's Serial Number should not increase.
